blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,363 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
